pages.title: Trading Tasks
pages.createSubtitle: Set up a new automated trading task

empty.createFirstTask: Create your first trading task to start automated trading

warnings.oneTaskPerAccountMessage: Only one trading task can be running per account at a time. Starting a new task on an account with an active task will stop the existing task.
warnings.liveTrading: Live Trading Active: Real money is at risk. Monitor closely.
warnings.cannotDeleteRunning: Cannot delete running or paused task. Stop it first.

form.chooseOandaAccount: Choose the OANDA account for live trading
form.chooseStrategyConfig: Choose a strategy configuration for this trading task
form.reviewBeforeCreating: Review your trading task configuration before creating
form.dryRunDescription: When enabled, orders are simulated locally and never sent to OANDA. Useful for testing strategies with real market data without risking actual funds.
form.dryRunWarning: Orders will be simulated locally. No real orders will be placed on OANDA.
form.hedgingDescription: When enabled, the strategy can hold both long and short positions simultaneously. Requires a hedging-enabled OANDA account.
form.activeTaskWarning: This account already has an active trading task:
form.activeTaskInstruction: Only one task can run per account at a time. Please stop the existing task before starting a new one.

risk.liveRiskWarningBody: Live trading involves substantial risk of loss. You should carefully consider whether trading is appropriate for you in light of your experience, objectives, financial resources, and other relevant circumstances.
risk.realMoneyAtRisk: Real money will be at risk
risk.pastPerformance: Past performance does not guarantee future results
risk.canStopAnytime: You can stop the task at any time
risk.acknowledgeRisks: I understand and acknowledge the risks of live trading
risk.practiceAccountBody: This is a practice account with virtual funds. No real money is at risk.

updateForm.updateStrategyConfig: Update the strategy configuration for this trading task
